opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't breathe, my right chest is crushed, and I feel so cold and dizzy.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe breathing difficulty and chest pain after being kicked in the chest by a horse.

symptom_narrative.onset: kicked in the chest by a horse 2 hours ago
symptom_narrative.character: heavy, crushing chest pain worse with every breath, severe breathlessness
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't catch my breath at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to breathe deeply or move
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: increasingly pale, cold, and lethargic over the last 30 minutes, nearly fainted trying to sit up
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: slumped on the couch, gasping for air, unable to stand

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified, struggling to breathe and speak

access_barriers.transport: roommate present but patient cannot be safely transported by private vehicle given respiratory distress and shock
